subject: Recoome of the Ginyu Force in a confident standing pose against a radiant yellow energy field
description: A large, muscular humanoid figure stands in a relaxed but imposing pose at center frame. The figure has bright reddish-orange hair swept back, and wears white-and-orange Ginyu Force battle armor. The build is notably bulky compared to other Force members. Radiating yellow and orange energy lines extend behind the figure against a warm golden background, creating a sunburst effect. The figure's expression reads as smug and self-assured. The composition frames the full body with the radiating energy creating a halo-like effect around the silhouette.
foreground: large muscular humanoid with bright hair in white-orange armor, arms relaxed at sides
background: yellow-gold radiant energy lines on warm background
